members.name: ACCESS_DENIED

members.name: BOOKING_FAILED
members.default_message: The ride booking could not be completed. Please try again later.

members.name: BOOKING_RESTRICTED

members.name: CANCELLATION_NOT_ALLOWED
members.default_message: This ride cannot be cancelled in its current status.

members.name: CHAIN_ERROR
